narrative:
Blendon-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 929 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
